snippet.title: GULZAAR CHHANIWALA : DADA RAVAN Song (Official Video) | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021
snippet.description:
GULZAAR CHHANIWALA : DADA RAVAN Song (Official Video) | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 | Nav Haryanvi

Nav Haryanvi Presenting "Dada Ravan Song (Official Video)" a New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Sung by Gulzaar Chhaniwala. Starring with Gulzaar Chhaniwala. Music Given by Gulzaar Chhaniwala. Lyrics Penned by Gulzaar Chhaniwala. This Video Directed by Gulzaar Chhaniwala. Music Label by Nupur Audio.

#GulzaarChhaniwala #DadaRavan #NavHaryanvi #NewHaryanviSong2021

Song - DADA RAVAN (Official Video)
Singer - Gulzaar Chhaniwala
Lyrics - Gulzaar Chhaniwala 
Music - Gulzaar Chhaniwala 
Mixing Mastering - Gulzaar Chhaniwala  
Director/Screenplay/Concept - Gulzaar Chhaniwala

Stream & Download Full Audio : 
Gaana : http://bit.ly/3tJ7Hha
Wynk : https://wynk.in/u/GqftaPO3f
JioSaavn : http://bit.ly/2MPLDRm
Hungama : https://bit.ly/2YZVDtB
Spotify : http://spoti.fi/2MUjPLz
YouTube Music : https://bit.ly/3q8aHBB
Resso Music : https://m.resso.app/ZSJ1MmaXf/
Amazon Music : https://amzn.to/2LHqYhW

Lyrics :
Hello Darling Teri Mili Se Supari, Sochya Pehla He Bata Dyun Tanne
Re Goli Maru Ya Re Gaddi Tale Dedu, Ya Re Sidha Zehar Hi Pila Du Tanne

Re Kaise Marna Teri Choice Marunga Re Bina Noise,
Manne Kalakara Ka Bhi Baajan Diya Saaj Na

Dada Ravan Ka Pujari Rakhe Yaara Gelya Yaari
Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raj Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sunke Jaiyae Bhag Na

Dada Ravan.. Dada Ravan..
Dada Ravan… Dada Ravan..

Tere Shehar Mein Jad Raatan Balak Maare Night Out
Chhore Gaam Ke Se Karde Haande Kaand Ladle

Naa Ghar Kya Ne Chirag Pana Koye Na Surag Pana
Faink Denge Nehar, Hath Bandh Ladle

Re Kali Meri Gaddi Aur Gaddi Mein Se Binde 
Aur Bindya Pe Sai Naam Likha Chhitan aale ka

Re Hum Thadde Landlord Pade Koye Na Farak
Bura Haal Tera Monthly Se Vetan Aale Ka

Re Main Baith Jata Je Ghara Main Chhod Deta Keh Ke
Par Ye Jutta Aale Kutte Baba Aale Baaz Na

Dada Ravan Ka Pujari Rakhe Yaara Gelya Yaari
Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raaz Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sunke Jaiye Bhag Na

Ankh Laal Rahve Meri Mere Jeet Ka Suroor
Log Dekh Ke Kave Se Yo To Daaru Pee Rehya Sai

Kayi Puche Haal Chal Deve Peeth Piche Gaal
Nue Loga Ki Re Baal Chhaniwala Jee Raha Se

Mera Koi Na Se Ant Jake Dekh Le Granth
Chhora Dil Ka Se Sant Bas Ache Kaaz Na

Janeman Ishq Ki Umeed Na Kar Humse ,Hum Maut Se Pyar Rakhte Hai..
Tum Radha Ho Phool Rakha Karo Baalon Mein..
Hum Ravan Ke Bhakat Hai, Aankho Mein Angar Rakhte Hai..

Dada Ravan Ka Pujari Rakhe Yaara Gelya Yaari
Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raj Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sun Ke Jaiye Bhag Na

Dada Ravan.. Dada Ravan..
Dada Ravan.. Dada Ravan..

Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sun Ke Jaieye Bhag Na


LOVE !! LIKE !! COMMENTS !! SUBSCRIBE

Kayi Puche Haal Chal Deve Peeth Piche Gaal
Nue Loga Ki Re Baal Chhaniwala Jee Raha Se

Mera Koi Na Se Ant Jake Dekh Le Granth
Chhora Dil Ka Se Sant Bas Ache Kaaz Na

Janeman Ishq Ki Umeed Na Kar Humse ,Hum Maut Se Pyar Rakhte Hai..
Tum Radha Ho Phool Rakha Karo Baalon Mein..
Hum Ravan Ke Bhakat Hai, Aankho Mein Angar Rakhte Hai..

Dada Ravan Ka Pujari Rakhe Yaara Gelya Yaari
Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raj Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sun Ke Jaiye Bhag Na

Dada Ravan.. Dada Ravan..
Dada Ravan.. Dada Ravan..

Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sun Ke Jaieye Bhag Na

What is the purpose of a roommate? When different people come to live together then adjusting, sharing, and contributing are bound to happen. The house can be an entertainment zone itself when it comes to agreeing with each other. And the bottom line is that roomies are the real saviors for us as they have problems for every solution. snippet.title: Hog Mountain Challenge Is On! (Clash Of Clans Lunar New Year Special)
snippet.description:
Do you have what it takes to conquer the mighty Golden Dragon and beat the Hog Mountain challenge? Earn 2 Builder Potions, Gems and Resources by scoring 3 stars in one attack during this Lunar New Year special event! 

Featuring: the Warrior King skin, the brand new Hog Mountain scenery, the Wall Breaker decoration, and the Lucky Shrub seasonal obstacle. Also a blast from the past: the Warrior Queen skin! 



Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #lunarnewyear #hogmountain #warriorking

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3031 - Full Episode - 6th November 2020
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch full episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZFhouqhrvP3Sx0U7qxdzJi

Episode 3031: Jetha Must Wake Up Early
------------------------------------------------------------------
Jetha is passing time over WhatsApp and reading jokes when Bapuji and Tapu enter the room. Bapuji asks Jetha if he has decided to wake up late on the very first day. When Jetha tells him that he isn't sleepy yet, Bappuji tells him that no one will wake Jetha up the next morning. He must do it on his own.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: King - Picasso | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
✅♥️Follow🤴🏽On Instagram♥️✅
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking

LYRICS:

Hook

Tujhe sochne ki chhod,
Bina dekhe tasveer bana dun main,
Nigaahon mein meri...Tum Ho!

Tujhe dhoondhne ki chhod,
Jab chaahun tujhe chhoo ke bataadun main,
Fizaaon mein meri...
 Ho! - 2.T

Verse 1

Ajkal raja sambhle na tere sheher walon se,
Ajkal saare todh rakhe daant zeher walon ke,
Mujhe nasha nai pasand par sajde mehkhaano ke,
Maanu tumhe hi nasha ye tum batao kaise maanoge?

Khair!!

Ankhon mein tere surma hai jawaan,
It makes me hypnotise teri bahan ch main rawaan,
Pata nahi tu kaise ise legi but baby if you ready then just be my baby mama?!

Kudi kari jaan lina meri flex,
Munde kari jaan sign mera throw,
Mere beriyaan nu pata kal bright,
Tayiyon Raja inna kardeyaan glow.

Kehndi baby mennu pata hega,
Sara din gang gang mere aagge so sweet!
Duje phone wich Shooteraan de number saare scar face mennu laggan so freak.

Main ta bas teri khair mangdiyaan,
Tera naa leke taane kase sangdiyaan.

Rap

Jaana bachho mein tu rehna ab chhod de,
Ye saale darr jaate chhote chhote mod pe,
Maine aate hi le mahaaul banaya,
Jab maare kehke bande aur hit dono road pe.

Mera lifestyle thoda different
Karam peeche saare kaand hain front
Ek banda tode kitto ke ghamad
Baby if it's no risk maybe it's no fun.

Bas meri jaan tu hi jaan pe bani,
Mai jaha se bhi shuru kar lun khatam vahi,
Jaha pe teri yaadein aayi mere ghar na ho
Zehen mein meri par saari rahein..

Hook

Tujhe sochne ki chhod,
Bina dekhe tasveer bana dun main,
Nigaahon mein meri...Tum Ho!

Tujhe dhoondhne ki chhod,
Jab chaahun tujhe chhoo ke bataadun main,
Fizaaon mein meri...Tum Ho!

Teri vaaj vicho' tera moonh dikhdai
Tere moonh nu dekh dekh Kaka geet likhdai

Likht meri de vich sift teri
Sift teri te ai grift meri
Teria grifta' ch Dil hai mera
Mere Dil vich ik Ghar hai tera
Tere ghar kol aakе bus rukgi
Samjhi na ethe meri gall mukkgi
Jithе mukki otho' challugi repeat te
Ni teri haa' - naa da fark ni penda dheeth te
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te....

Dhupp jado' tere chehre utte bethdi
Chehra tera janda meri rooh ch bethda
Rooh meri bethi tereya' khyala' ch
Tera ta' vajood lgge khooh ch bethda
Khooh ton bahar aaja jaane meriye
Aaja daryava' di krava' sair ni
Drya ton ocean da raah puchh k
Galla' kr beach te dubo k pair ni
Pair tere chhoon giya' lehra' aan k
Lehra' vich Sooraj dubbuga Jaan k
Dubbde ton chadh-de tyi' gall krange
Gall uljhake aape hall krange
Hall hoi gall te charha dyi' phull ni

Mere likhe geeta' nu chhuha dyi bullh ni
Tere bulla' te smile jiyu masala meat te
Ni tere Naina vicho' 2 peg laune neat de

Lehra' vich Sooraj dubbuga Jaan k
Dubbde ton chadh-de tyi' gall krange
Gall uljhake aape hall krange
Hall hoi gall te charha dyi' phull ni

Mere likhe geeta' nu chhuha dyi bullh ni
Tere bulla' te smile jiyu masala meat te
Ni tere Naina vicho' 2 peg laune neat de
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri te

If you have any questions for Anitha Sampath, do ask her in the comments section.

Keep watching Anitha Sampath Vlogs for more insights from the Bigg Boss house. In her next video, she’ll talk about her relationship with other contestants.

snippet.title: Sona Lagda (Official Video) Sukriti, Prakriti, Sukhe | Bharatt-Saurabh | Satti Dhillon | New Song
snippet.description:
To celebrate the season of love VYRL Originals brings to you a Valentines special - Sona Lagda sung by the multi-talented twin sisters Sukriti - Prakriti collaborating for the very first time with the hitmaker Sukh-E Muzical Doctorz. This peppy dance song has been co-composed and written by Bharatt-Saurabh and Sukh-E and the music video has been directed by the popular Satti Dhillon. The melodic drop and vibrant music video is sure to get your foot tapping. Are you ready for this banger?

#SukritiPrakriti #SukhE #SonaLagda

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJ15fDfJ/

♫ Wynk Music - https://wynk.in/u/V3Rb56bXw

♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/album/sona-lagda

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/p/album/hindi/sona-lagda-2021/MVBj5k9MBCM_

♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/7pef1s876Fl3KO2LH1eSFx?si=_BCadcjtRsynIPQsi8rRow

♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/sona-lagda/1551963715?i=1551963717

♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08VWPY8R3?do=play&trackAsin=B08VW8M79N&ref=dm_sh_yjahxy9lbxow6IGh744DFw4fp

♫ YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=8uIgCCHnbBQ&feature=share
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎧  Audio Credits

🎤 Singer - Sukriti Prakriti & Sukh E
🎶  Composer - Bharatt – Saurabh & Sukh E
➟ Lyrics - Bharatt – Saurabh & Sukh E
➟ Music Producer - Bharatt-Saurabh
➟ Mix & Mastered - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay.

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Director Satti Dhillon
➟ Creative Director Pooja Gujral
➟ Dop Shinda singh
➟ Editor Oswin
➟ Choreographer Sahaj singh & Shreoshi
➟ Art director Mr. blacc
➟ Assistant director Sumit kumar & Prince mundi
➟ Assistant choreographer Pranjal Dutta & Priyanka Mitra
➟ Colorist Ercan kucuk (The Post brothers)
➟ Hairstylist (sukhe) Jeevan
➟ Makeup Rajan passi
➟ Still Photography Shivam
➟ Line producer Kuldeep production

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
📝 Lyrics

Jab se mili hai teri meri ye nazar
Rab di sau kuch hua hai asar

Lakh lakh munde rakhen meri ni khabar
Ek mainu bas teri hi fikar
Kahin vi tu mainu le ja soneya
Sang raj ke chalan main ambaraan
Tenu takdi phiran din raat ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Mainu apna banale tu yaar ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Light weight jhanjharan juti sadkan nu chumdi phire
Gold chains laake mascara dolled up hoke ghumdi phire
You hotter than the lava baby girl
Lit tera mascara baby girl
Ni rang tera strawberry varga
Ni dil kare khaajaan baby girl

Fashion nova de jean kude
Lakk tera heavy body lean kude
Apple bottoms so fired up
Dil chore kare badi ni tu mean kude
Dil chori kare badi ni tu mean kude

Tenu takdi phiran din raat ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda
Mainu apna banale tu yaar ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Kudi soni tu meriyan baharan ve
One in million lagdi tu yaara ve
Lagdi tu soni lagdi
Mere kaul tu aake baija ve
Mitthiyan gallan karja
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Sona lagda tu sona lagda
Soni lagdi tu soni lagdi
Sona lagda tu sona lagda
Soni lagdi tu soni lagdi

Sona lagda

snippet.title: Watch Ramdas Athawale’s poetic farewell to Ghulam Nabi Azad in Rajya Sabha
snippet.description:
Rajya Sabha MP Ramdas Athawale gave a poetic farewell to Congress leader Ghulam Nabi Azad who retires from the upper house on 15th February 2021. Delivering a speech in his inimitable style, Athawale lauded Azad’s services and also made an offer to the senior Congress leader. Athawale said that if the Congress does not give Azad a Rajya Sabha ticket, the RPI would gladly do so. Watch this full video for all the details.

Delivering a speech in his inimitable style, Athawale lauded Azad’s services and also made an offer to the senior Congress leader. Athawale said that if the Congress does not give Azad a Rajya Sabha ticket, the RPI would gladly do so. Watch this full video for all the details.

snippet.title: VK Sasikala pays tribute to late Tamil Nadu CM Jayalalithaa, returns to Chennai after 4 years
snippet.description:
#VKSasikala #TamilNadu
Expelled AIADMK leader V.K. Sasikala returned to poll-bound Tamil Nadu after 4 years Monday. Ahead of the journey to Chennai from Bengaluru, Sasikala and T.T.V. Dhinakaran offered floral tribute to late Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Jayalalithaa. Sasikala will meet her sister-in-law on 8 February in Chennai.

snippet.title: Kundali Bhagya: Trouble in Kritika & Akshay's wedding
snippet.description:
Watch the report of Saas Bahu Aur Saazish to know the latest updates from the sets of the serial Kundali Bhagya. Have a look at how choas erupted in Kritika & Akshay's wedding. Stay connected for regular updates on top entertainment stories. 

Watch Saas Bahu aur Saazish (SBS) on ABP News daily at 2:30 PM to know what's happening in Indian television and bollywood industry with Aditi Arora Sawant. Presenting you the latest updates and daily dose of entertainment in the form of star cast interviews, gossips, updates of reality shows, behind the scenes, twist in serials. Join the non stop entertainment with Saas Bahu aur Saazish for all the juicy news.

टेलीविजन और बॉलीवुड इंडस्ट्री के बारे में जानने के लिए एबीपी न्यूज़ पर देखिये सास बहु और साज़िश (एसबीएस) अदिति रॉव सावंत के साथ  रोज़ाना 2:30 बजे। एसबीएस पेश करता है स्टार कास्ट के इंटरव्यू, रियलिटी शो के अपडेट, सीरियल्स के नए मोड़, परदे के पीछे की कुछ गपशप और भी बहुत कुछ। नॉन स्टॉप मनोरंजन के लिए शामिल हों सास बहू और साज़िश के साथ। 

For your daily dose of Entertainment, you can subscribe to our channel on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/sbsabpnews

ABP Hindi: http://abpnews.abplive.in/
ABP English: http://www.abplive.in/

snippet.title: That Irritating Uncle | Comedy | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Whatever gender you are, after reaching certain age, wherever we go we are bombarded with the same question, When are you getting married? When is your turn? etc.
After certain point of time it really gets on our nerve but we cannot express our anger or irritation towards them. So this video expresses those feelings for you all who are in that space. Enjoy.

Concept & Production
Dreamz Unimited Team

snippet.title: Molkki | मोलक्की  | Episode 61 & 62 | Recap
snippet.description:
After attending Manas and Juhi's school function, Purvi and Virendra have a discussion about the attack upon him. But the discussion comes to an abrupt end when Purvi claims to know the perpetrator behind the attack who is none other than Virendra's brother, Vaibhav! How will Virendra react to this shocking revelation?

#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.description:
Official Video of Gajendra Verma's - "Ratjage" from the Album "Summary" - Chapter 03 

"Summary - A Musical Series" is a romantic tale. The story starts with the first song and ends with the fifth song. A musical series on the summary of love taking romance to a whole new level along with the most beloved pair essayed by singer Gajendra Verma and beautiful Manasi Moghe.

VIDEO CREDITS

Agency: Qyuki Digital Media
Record Label: Virtual Planet Music
Virtual Planet Team: Akshay Jain, Krishna Kishore, Preet Bhullar, Mohit Rajyaguru, Sourabh Swami & Amit Kumar

LYRICS

Ishq mein ratjage,
Hain hone ab lage,
Kare ye dil kya...
Tu hai mehram mera
Mein bas hun tera
To Mushkil kya...
Tujhko khud mein utaar lun
Jaise seene mein saansein...
Bin tere andar hi andar
Gadti hain mere faasein...

Tu, tu yaara mera dil
Tu yaara meri jaan
Tu har armaan...
Haan tu sang hain mere
Main Shukre Khuda
Main sajde kara...

Chandasa Mukhda tera,
Aise aankhon mein bhara
Jaise hothon pe dhara tera naam....
Bin tere na din uga
Na to raaton ka paata
Sari duniya mein sham hi sham...
Tere sang sang chali gayi..
Mere hasne ki baatein...
Meri aankhon ke niche ab
Aagayi Kaali raatein....

Tu, tu yaara mera dil
Tu yaara meri jaan
Tu har armaan...
Haan tu sang hain mere
Main Shukre Khuda
Main sajde kara

Channa Ve teri yaad sataye
Channa Ve mujhe chain na aaye
Channa Ve tu jo laut ke aaye
To dil mera shukar manaye
Aajave meri dhoopo ke saaye
Aajave mujhe meh jalaye
Aajave mujhe hizar mitaye
Mile to mujhe sab miljaye


For Live Shows Bookings & Business Enquiries: 
Prashant Chaudhary +919988989833

© 2021, Virtual Planet Production Pvt. Ltd.
#Summary #GajendraVerma #Ratjage #TopHits2021 #PopSongs2021

snippet.title: Kuch Toh Hai | कुछ तो है | Episode 1 | Priya's Quest For The Truth Takes Her To Mussoorie
snippet.description:
Priya is asked to leave from the Imperial College Hostel by the warden who hands her a photo, and asks her to look for her mother. Priya's quest takes her all the way to Mussoorie, where the ghost-busters are all set to bust a sorceress who'd come there after 102 long years. The local girls are gung ho over the girl-magnet, Rehan, visiting the city, and their excitement touches the sky. Keep a watch as these events culminate into a stirring story.

#ColorsTV #KuchTohHai

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KuNPfDfj2l-BoCvM68HUtPR

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Bani, the adi naagin challenged the laws of nature and loved Veer, the cheel. The result? The birth of Rehaan - a deadly creature with both their qualities. But, what happens when he falls in love with Priya, a fairy? An epic saga unfolds!

snippet.title: SIT | New F.R.I.E.N.D.S | S2E17 Part 2 | Comedy | Husband Wife | Friends
snippet.description:
#Friends
Abhi and Meera have made new friends and Rishi and Rohini are getting extremely jealous and are feeling left out. They too are determined to make new friends and teach Abhi and Meera a lesson. Will they succeed? The suspense is too much to handle! But the wait is over. Watch the new episode now!
NEW F.R.I.E.N.D.S – E17 Part 2
_______________________________

ABOUT SIT:
Shitty Ideas Trending is an endeavour to create entertaining videos which are not just funny but also hugely relatable. Husband wife comedy sketches, Web Series, relationship banter, couple humour, and even meaningful fictional short films every now and then. Whether you are glued to watching the cute and adorable husband Rishi with his wife Rohini, or the smart and suave Abhimanyu with his wife Meera, whether you love to watch the adorable yet eccentric maid Baby or are just addicted to little Jahaan’s smile, or maybe you like to get a dose of relationship tips from Abhimanyu or just want to avoid the mistakes that Rishi makes, SIT is the place for everybody who wishes to get a dose of entertainment when on the move. The videos are short and snackable and are for one and all. Ranging from THE BETTER HALF with Chhavi Mittal and Karan V Grover, PYAR KA PUNCH with Pracheen Chauhan and Pooja Gor, MAID IN HEAVEN with Shubhangi Litoria, or GRASS IS GREENER ON THE OTHER SIDE with a combination of Chhavi Mittal, Karan V Grover, Pracheen Chauhan, Pooja Gor, creator MOHIT HUSSEIN brings you a great mix of content.

en.description:
#Friends
Abhi and Meera have made new friends and Rishi and Rohini are getting extremely jealous and are feeling left out. They too are determined to make new friends and teach Abhi and Meera a lesson. Will they succeed? The suspense is too much to handle! But the wait is over. Watch the new episode now!
NEW F.R.I.E.N.D.S – E17 Part 2
_______________________________
Do SHARE the video if you LIKE it, and leave us a COMMENT! Don't forget to SUBSCRIBE to Shitty Ideas Trending for a fun video every Tuesday & Thursday!
www.youtube.com/shittyideastrending
Watch PART 1 here:
https://youtu.be/js-95g6VB7k
________________________________
Also subscribe to BE SAFE, a new endeavour by SIT. All about online crimes and how to safeguard yourself while on the internet.
https://www.youtube.com/besafebysit
__________________________
ABOUT SIT:
Shitty Ideas Trending is an endeavour to create entertaining videos which are not just funny but also hugely relatable. Husband wife comedy sketches, Web Series, relationship banter, couple humour, and even meaningful fictional short films every now and then. Whether you are glued to watching the cute and adorable husband Rishi with his wife Rohini, or the smart and suave Abhimanyu with his wife Meera, whether you love to watch the adorable yet eccentric maid Baby or are just addicted to little Jahaan’s smile, or maybe you like to get a dose of relationship tips from Abhimanyu or just want to avoid the mistakes that Rishi makes, SIT is the place for everybody who wishes to get a dose of entertainment when on the move. The videos are short and snackable and are for one and all. Ranging from THE BETTER HALF with Chhavi Mittal and Karan V Grover, PYAR KA PUNCH with Pracheen Chauhan and Pooja Gor, MAID IN HEAVEN with Shubhangi Litoria, or GRASS IS GREENER ON THE OTHER SIDE with a combination of Chhavi Mittal, Karan V Grover, Pracheen Chauhan, Pooja Gor, creator MOHIT HUSSEIN brings you a great mix of content.

snippet.title: Tumhe Dekh Ke - Official Video | Salman Ali, Mateena | Salim Sulaiman | Shradha P | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
Get ready to fall in love this Valentine's Day with ‘Tumhe Dekh Ke’, a quintessential romantic ballad by composers Salim - Sulaiman, with the video set in various parts of Kashmir. It’s a love story of a young couple in the valley, where the boy is expressing his feelings for the girl and how every moment they share takes him into a trance. The video features Salman Ali who has also lent his voice to the song.

🎧 Listen to & Download "Tumhe Dekh Ke" on:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6NiyO5E6ALWR5LznZPlaJx?si=kUGaQcbsRQ6zhSRS6go6cQ

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/tumhe-dekh-ke-single/1551366524

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/tumhe-dekh-ke-1

JioSaavn:https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/tumhe-dekh-ke/QSU5SAZ,WXI

Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/music/song/tumhe-dekh-ke/or_196006028565_ING642100104

Hungama Music: https://www.hungama.com/song/tumhe-dekh-ke/61980788/

To Set "Tumhe Dekh Ke" Your Caller Tune: 
Vodafone Customers Dial 53712311217
Idea Customers Dial 5678912311217
BSNL Customers Dial 5678912311217

Audio Credits
Music Composed & Produced by : Salim - Sulaiman
Lyrics : Shradha Pandit
Singer : Salman Ali
Additional Music Production : Raj Pandit
Guitars : Ankur Mukherjee
Dholak : Aslam Dafrani, Navin Sharma
Tabla : Navin Sharma
Rabab : Irfan Nabi
Live Strings : Budapest Art Orchestra
Live Strings Orchestrated by : Samarth Srinivasan
Recorded by : Aftab Khan & Raj Pandit at Blue Productions
Mixed & Mastered by : Aftab Khan at Headroom Studio
Distributed by Global Music Junction

Video Credits
Director/ D.O.P : Tassaduq Hussain Baba
Executive Producer : Radhika Mistry
DA : Bisma Farooq
AD : Rouf Fida
Editor : Abhishek Seth
Colour Grade : Black Acid Production
First AC : Arif Bashir Wani 
2nd AC : Rouf Fida
Production Head : Mehraj Bhat 
Production Assistant : Zeeshan Farooq 
Production Assistant : Zubair Hamid Khan 
Best Boy : Farzan Shakeel
Best Boy Grip : Nadeem Farooq 
Transport : Farooq Ahmad
Line Producer : Misba Ali

Cast: 
Featuring 
Mateena Rajput 
Father : Lone Bashir
Mother : Jameela Akther
Casting Director : Shaarika Pandit (ShaariCast)

Managed by : Nirav Thakar, Radhika Mistry
Digital Strategy : Shivansh Jindal
Album Creatives : Dishant Mistry
PR: Lily Ahluwalia

Lyrics:

Yun toh bahut haseen chehre dekhe hai
Kise se ishq ho jaana toh, khuda ki marzi hoti hai, khuda ki marzi hoti hai

Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya hai
Tumhe dekhke lagta hai
Jannat se barsi dua hai

Dil mein basa lo sanam
Ke bin tere jeena kya hai
Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya hai

Pooche duniya 
Kya hai yeh maajara 
dil ka yeh hashar kya kahein 

Chhupta hai kahaan 
yeh rang hai pyaar ka
Kiska hai asar kya kahein

Hum toh izhaar-e-mohabbat karenge
tu jo ishaara kare
Aakhir yeh zindagi tumhari hai
Tumhi se jahaan hai 

Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya hai
Tumhe dekhke lagta hai
Jannat se barsi dua hai

Dil mein basa lo sanam
Ke bin tere jeena kya hai
Tumhe dekh ke lagta hai
Waqt jaise tham sa gaya

dil ka yeh hashar kya kahein

yeh rang hai pyaar ka

tu jo ishaara kare

Tumhi se jahaan hai

snippet.title: 10 th Level Prelims Exam ന്റെ Hall ticket വന്നിട്ടുണ്ട്.💥.  ബാക്കി ഉള്ളവരുടെ Exam എപ്പോൾ??
snippet.description:
💥💥നിങ്ങൾക്ക് ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതൽ ഉപകാരപ്പെടുന്നത്  Exam oriented ആയിട്ടുള്ള ക്ലാസ്സുകൾ ആയിരിക്കും. ഇതുവരെ exam ന് ചോദിച്ച ചോദ്യങ്ങൾ മാത്രം ഉൾപ്പെടുത്തിയത്.. 

Part 1-- https://youtu.be/DK8UBR6iOMU

Part 2-- https://youtu.be/ucfNwpDi_6I

Part 3 --  https://youtu.be/jK8ViItc1yw

Part 4 -- https://youtu.be/9oa6Z-2zLNA

part 5-  https://youtu.be/YY7SeXSlSLw 

part 6-.https://youtu.be/gwMl_RqFKrg

part 7 -  https://youtu.be/M5XAlwgkLTA

😊 നമ്മുടെ channel ന്റെ PLAYLIST check ചെയ്ത് നോക്കുക. ഓരോ topic um seperate playlist ആക്കി വെച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്.. കണ്ടുനോക്കു. നിങ്ങൾക്ക് വേണ്ട എല്ലാം അവിടെ കാണും  😊

📢  Mr & Mrs psc offical എന്നാണ് നമ്മുടെ Telegram channel ന്റെ പേര്.. Mr and Mrs psc എന്നാണ് നമ്മുടെ Telegram group ന്റെ  പേര്.. channel ലും ഗ്രൂപ്പ്‌ ലും join ചെയ്യുക.. മുകളിൽ പറഞ്ഞ പേര് Telegram ൽ search ചെയ്യുക..

ഞങ്ങളുടെ ചാനൽ ഇനിയും നിങ്ങൾ Subscribe ചെയ്‌തിട്ടില്ലായെങ്കിൽ Subscribe ചെയ്യുക...

#MrandMrspsc  #Admitcard  #PscExam


 #Hallticket

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1171 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Virat's parents barge into Harak's home and reveal that they have found out that Heer is alive. How will Harak and Preeto react to the news? Watch this sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Pre Teaser of Radhe Shyam | Prabhas | Pooja Hegde | Radha Krishna Kumar | Glimpse on February 14th
snippet.description:
Pre Teaser Of Radhe Shyam On UV Creations. Radhe Shyam is an upcoming Indian romantic drama film starring Rebel Star Prabhas and Pooja Hegde. Written and directed by Radha Krishna Kumar. Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. The film is presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. Movie is Shot simultaneously in Telugu, Tamil and Hindi. Also starring Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others. Cinematography  Manoj Paramahamsa. Music Theme by Mithoon. Art Director Ravinder.

A Glimpse on February 14th. Save the Date.

#PreTeaserOfRadheShyam #Prabhas #PoojaHegde #RadhaKrishnaKumar #UVCreations #TSeries #Prabhas20 #RadheShyamTeaser #RadheShyamMotionPoster

Get closer to the likes of Sergio Aguero, Kevin De Bruyne, Gabriel Jesus, Raheem Sterling, Riyad Mahrez, Benjamin Mendy and the rest of Pep Guardiola's team.

snippet.title: F9 - The Big Game Spot
snippet.description:
F9
www.thefastsaga.com

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past. 

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.  

Vin Diesel’s Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad). 

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe—from London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.  

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar® winner Helen Mirren and Oscar® winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom’s past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.  

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.

snippet.title: Magic Bottle 2 | Laughing Soda
snippet.description:
#Laughingsoda #Leelaigal #MagicBottle

Laughing Soda presents "Magic Bottle 2" - a Tamil comedy video. In the previous video, you show how friends used the bottle to play truth or dare.

In this video, Swetha picks the same dirty bottle, and as she is about to put it in the trash, she hears the bottle speaking. Holding the bottle in her hand, she says the magical lines four times.

What you see next will surprise you. Watch Swetha's wishes come true in this Tamil funny video. She gets chocolate and meets all her school friends. 

Watch Magic Bottle 2 to see Swetha and her friends refreshing their school memories.

#Laughingsoda #Leelaigal #MagicBottle

Laughing Soda presents "Magic Bottle 2" - a Tamil comedy video. In the previous video, you show how friends used the bottle to play truth or dare.

In this video, Swetha picks the same dirty bottle, and as she is about to put it in the trash, she hears the bottle speaking. Holding the bottle in her hand, she says the magical lines four times.

What you see next will surprise you. Watch Swetha's wishes come true in this Tamil funny video. She gets chocolate and meets all her school friends. 

Watch Magic Bottle 2 to see Swetha and her friends refreshing their school memories. 

Also, Laughing Soda is creating a Tamil web series. Lack of funds is putting a hold on the production. Please do your bit to support the Youtube creators. 

Gpay Number: 9092781147

snippet.title: Sadhguru Handles a Cobra | Shorts
snippet.description:
Sadhguru Handles a Cobra
#Sadhguru #Shorts

Yogi, mystic and visionary, Sadhguru is a spiritual master with a difference. An arresting blend of profundity and pragmatism, his life and work serves as a reminder that yoga is a contemporary science, vitally relevant to our times. 

----------------------------------------
In the Grace of Yoga” with Sadhguru is a unique Yoga program that offers an in-depth exploration of the five elements (earth, water, air, fire, and space), their significance, their manifestation within us and an opportunity to learn powerful tools for their purification. By purifying and mastering the five elements, or pancha bhutas, you can bring your body and mind to a vibrant state of health and rejuvenation.  

The program is available in two formats. ( Register now ) 
  3-day online program: March 9-11, 2021
  1-day online program: March 11, 2021  
⚡ https://isha.co/GOY-YT⚡
------------------------------------------------------------
For the very first time this Mahashivratri, Sadhguru has opened up the possibility of receiving Rudraksha Diksha. Receive a Rudraksha powerfully energized by Sadhguru and other materials which would support the seeker in sadhana. Register today!
